//: Digital Asset Links — proves the APK and the website share an owner, which lets the TWA run WITHOUT the address bar (otherwise it falls back to a Custom Tab that shows the URL for a second).
//deploy: Serve the filled-in version at https://YOUR-DOMAIN.example/.well-known/assetlinks.json (see 'Serving assetlinks.json' in twa/README.md — ASP.NET Core does NOT serve dot-directories from wwwroot by default).
//fingerprint: Replace the SHA-256 below with YOUR signing key's fingerprint: `keytool -list -v -keystore twa/android.keystore -alias android` (or copy it from `bubblewrap fingerprint`). Use the upload/app-signing key you actually ship with.
